issue_title: fix: restore expand functionality broken in v1.0.3
issue_body_preview:
The expand feature was broken due to untrack() wrapper around setHeight() which prevented reactive updates needed for expand animations and layout.

- Remove untrack() from setHeight() call to restore reactivity
- Keep untrack() around deleteToast() to prevent nested effect updates
- Fixes expan
test_description_zh: 在页面上触发多条 toast 通知，观察 toast 列表的展开（expand）功能是否正常工作：将鼠标悬停在 toast 堆叠区域上或点击展开按钮，查看所有 toast 是否能正确展开并显示展开动画效果，以及展开后各 toast 的高度和布局是否正确。
expected_result_zh: 当触发展开操作时，堆叠的 toast 通知应平滑展开，每条 toast 具有正确的高度和间距，展开动画流畅无卡顿，所有 toast 内容完整可见，布局排列正确无重叠。
